prompt: A vibrant lime green Porsche 911 GT3 is showcased in a dynamic, graphic poster. The car is positioned in the center, viewed from its left side in a three-quarter profile, facing right. Its sleek, aerodynamic design is emphasized with black accents, large rear spoiler, and distinctive wheels. Subtle overlays of a faded lime green Porsche hint at its branding and lineage in the background. A prominent vertical lime green stripe cuts through the poster, framing the Porsche crest and the "PORSCHE" text above the car. Below the vehicle, the "911 GT3" model designation is displayed in a bold, stylized font. Graphics illustrating acceleration, power, and top speed are arranged at the bottom, along with descriptive text. The overall composition is clean, modern, and energetic, utilizing a limited color palette of lime green, white, black, and the red, gold, and black of the Porsche emblem. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the car's contours and the graphic elements of the poster, creating a high-impact visual presentation.
